title: Kubectl user preferences (kuberc) — Example
text:
The following example shows an
"Allowlist"
policy with its allowlist:
POSIX
Windows
apiVersion
:
kubectl.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind
:
Preference
credentialPluginPolicy
:
Allowlist
credentialPluginAllowlist
:
-
command
:
my-trusted-binary
-
command
:
/usr/local/bin/my-other-trusted-binary
apiVersion
:
kubectl.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind
:
Preference
credentialPluginPolicy
:
Allowlist
credentialPluginAllowlist
:
-
command
:
my-trusted-binary
-
command
:
"C:\my-other-trusted-binary"
